title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: WILLAMALANE ADULT ACTIVITY CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily through the winter season. 215 W C Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 736-4544 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 736-4544 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, visit website to confirm hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILLAMALANE ADULT ACTIVITY CENTER
